message:
fix(palette): use whitelist for help toggle to avoid intercepting text inputs

The ? key should only open help in phases without text inputs (PhaseTarget,
PhaseXFResults). Previously it was blocked in PhaseEdit and PhaseXFSearch
but still intercepted in PhaseCommand, preventing ? from being typed in
the command filter. Switch to whitelist approach instead of blacklist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
